name: studio.list_pages
description: Enumerate pages on a Studio site. Returns id, slug, status, and updated_at for each page. Supports pagination.
whenToUse: Agent needs to discover the target page_id before editing or publishing.
Operator asks 'what pages does site X have' without naming one.
Building a pre-flight checklist before a bulk update or publish sweep.
whenNotToUse: Caller already has the target page_id — go directly to studio.get_page.
Caller is polling every few seconds for a new page's appearance — use create_page's response, not a list loop.
Caller wants blog posts — use studio.list_posts; pages and blog posts are separate surfaces.
